reason: Generated-copy compatibility for Windows PhysX 3.4 under clang-cl, CMake 4, and NVTX-disabled builds.

text_adjustments.original:
IF(TARGET_BUILD_PLATFORM STREQUAL "Windows")
	# NOTE: Doesn't make sense for all platforms - ARM
	IF(CMAKE_CL_64)
		SET(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBNAME "nvToolsExt64_1")
		SET(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBPATH_SUFFIX "x64")
	ELSE(CMAKE_CL_64)
		SET(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBNAME nvToolsExt32_1)
		SET(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBPATH_SUFFIX "Win32")
	ENDIF(CMAKE_CL_64)				
					
					
	FIND_LIBRARY(	NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES ${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBNAME}
					${GW_DEPS_ROOT}/nvToolsExt
					${GW_DEPS_ROOT}/Externals/nvToolsExt/1/lib/${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBPATH_SUFFIX}
					${GW_DEPS_ROOT}/sw/physx/externals/nvToolsExt/1/lib/${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBPATH_SUFFIX}
					)
	
	FIND_PACKAGE_HANDLE_STANDARD_ARGS(nvToolsExt DEFAULT_MSG NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES NVTOOLSEXT_INCLUDE_DIRS)
ELSE()
	# Exclude the libraries for non-windows platforms
	FIND_PACKAGE_HANDLE_STANDARD_ARGS(nvToolsExt DEFAULT_MSG NVTOOLSEXT_INCLUDE_DIRS)
ENDIF()
text_adjustments.patched:
IF(TARGET_BUILD_PLATFORM STREQUAL "Windows")
	# PX_NVTX is disabled by the Windows PhysX 3.4 release configuration used by this route.
	# Keep nvToolsExt headers available, but do not require or link the missing import library.
	IF(PHYSX_WINDOWS_ENABLE_NVTX OR PXSHARED_WINDOWS_ENABLE_NVTX)
		IF(CMAKE_CL_64)
			SET(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBNAME "nvToolsExt64_1")
			SET(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBPATH_SUFFIX "x64")
		ELSE(CMAKE_CL_64)
			SET(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBNAME nvToolsExt32_1)
			SET(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBPATH_SUFFIX "Win32")
		ENDIF(CMAKE_CL_64)

		FIND_LIBRARY(	NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES ${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBNAME}
					${GW_DEPS_ROOT}/nvToolsExt
					${GW_DEPS_ROOT}/Externals/nvToolsExt/1/lib/${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBPATH_SUFFIX}
					${GW_DEPS_ROOT}/sw/physx/externals/nvToolsExt/1/lib/${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBPATH_SUFFIX}
					)

		FIND_PACKAGE_HANDLE_STANDARD_ARGS(nvToolsExt DEFAULT_MSG NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES NVTOOLSEXT_INCLUDE_DIRS)
	ELSE()
		SET(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES "")
		FIND_PACKAGE_HANDLE_STANDARD_ARGS(nvToolsExt DEFAULT_MSG NVTOOLSEXT_INCLUDE_DIRS)
	ENDIF()
ELSE()
	# Exclude the libraries for non-windows platforms
	FIND_PACKAGE_HANDLE_STANDARD_ARGS(nvToolsExt DEFAULT_MSG NVTOOLSEXT_INCLUDE_DIRS)
ENDIF()

TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(PhysXCommon PUBLIC PxFoundation)
IF(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES)
	TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(PhysXCommon PUBLIC ${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES})
ENDIF()

text_adjustments.original: TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(PhysX PRIVATE LowLevel LowLevelAABB LowLevelCloth LowLevelDynamics LowLevelParticles PxTask SceneQuery SimulationController PUBLIC ${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES} PhysXCommon PxFoundation PxPvdSDK)
text_adjustments.patched:
TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(PhysX PRIVATE LowLevel LowLevelAABB LowLevelCloth LowLevelDynamics LowLevelParticles PxTask SceneQuery SimulationController PUBLIC PhysXCommon PxFoundation PxPvdSDK)
IF(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES)
	TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(PhysX PUBLIC ${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES})
ENDIF()

TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(PxPvdSDK PUBLIC PxFoundation)
IF(NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES)
	TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(PxPvdSDK PUBLIC ${NVTOOLSEXT_LIBRARIES})
ENDIF()
